name: XR 信息层（HUD 设计语言）
must_keep: holographic XR information layer using the product's design tokens: primary blue #4a8eff, normal green #22c55e, warning amber #f59e0b, alarm red #ef4444; thin-stroke Lucide-style line icons; monospaced numerals for data; floating data rings, a glowing guide path on the floor, ROI highlight frames; clean, restrained, minimal — color and data appear ONLY in this layer, never as physical screens
